overview: TravelEase is a premium full-stack travel booking platform inspired by RedBus, MakeMyTrip, and Booking.com. It supports bus, train, flight, and hotel booking with interactive seat/room selection, a user dashboard, fully functional admin panel, AI travel assistant, free food service, and a luxury About Founder page.
features: Bus, Train, Flight, and Hotel booking with interactive seat/room selection
User authentication with Internet Identity and profile management
Free Food Service with eligibility detection and meal selection
Simulated payment checkout with multiple methods and transaction history
User dashboard with bookings, saved travelers, wishlist, loyalty points, and referral codes
Fully functional admin panel with analytics charts, CRUD management, and coupon system
AI travel assistant chatbot powered by OpenAI with admin-set API key
About Founder luxury page with glassmorphism, animated timeline, and image placeholders
Dark/light mode, skeleton loaders, toast notifications, and smooth animations throughout
